name: EDMUND PUZZLE AND THE MYSTERY OF THE SACRED RELICS

reviews.review_description: Although never mentioned this game is just constant religious talk, verses, etc.

I genuinely enjoyed every minute of it. The blend of adventure, brain-teasing challenges, and rich religious themes was both refreshing and inspiring. I wasn't expecting to learn so much about sacred traditions and spiritual values through a game, but this one surprised me in the best way possible.

The story is engaging, the puzzles are
 clever without being frustrating, and the way religious elements are woven into the gameplay feels respectful, meaningful, and even educational. It made me reflect—and that’s rare in a puzzle game.

If you're looking for something that goes beyond simple entertainment and actually leaves you with something to think about, I highly recommend it. Kudos to the developers for creating something so unique and heartfelt!
I read it had teleportation it doesn’t it made me sick in seconds and I can’t get a refund

This is a very strange game. They should say in the description that it’s very heavy on the religious theme. Lay your head on a rock on the floor??? Too much! And constantly over run with bible verses! Nothing wrong with that if you are told ahead of time and choose to be in church while playing this game.

developer_response.body:
Hello! Kobi54
Thank you for sharing your thoughts.

We’re sorry to hear that the experience didn’t meet your expectations. Our games are inspired by Christian themes, and we understand that this may not resonate with everyone. Your feedback is truly appreciated, and we’ve updated the game description to make this aspect clearer from the beginning.

At Fish Journey, we value every comment and are committed to improving with care and respect for our community. Thank you for giving us the opportunity to grow.

Kind regards,
The Fish Journey Team
Inspire good

reviews.review_description: This game is absolutely amazing! It brings such a fresh and unique concept—I had so much fun solving puzzles while immersing myself in the Word of God. It's entertaining, educational, and inspiring at the same time. I can't wait to see more games like this from the studio! Highly, highly recommended! Congratulations to the developers on this fantastic creation!

I was prepared to overlook the heavy handed preaching, though I was looking for more “Indiana Jones” then “Bob Jones”, but then it asked me to put my head on the floor. 
Rather difficult when someone is limited to chair play. 
Guess remembering the less able was too “woke”. 
I’ll take my money back.

developer_response.body:
Hello, Celesta.70096

Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us.

We’re truly sorry to hear that the game didn’t meet your expectations, particularly regarding accessibility and the overall tone. While our titles are inspired by Christian themes, we understand that finding the right balance between narrative and gameplay is essential — and your feedback helps us grow in that direction.

Regarding your note on chair play: we deeply regret that this part of the game created a barrier. Accessibility matters, and your comment highlighted a key area where improvement was needed. We're already working on updates to make this moment — and others like it — more inclusive for players with different mobility needs.

At Fish Journey, we’re committed to learning from our community and making thoughtful changes. Thank you for helping us evolve and stay true to our mission of creating games that inspire good — with respect for all.                                                                           

Kind regards,
The Fish Journey Team

reviews.review_description: Dude, I’m in a chair, a wheelchair! How do I crouch?!

developer_response.body:
Hello, Candicebarr

Thank you so much for your message — and for speaking up.

You’re absolutely right: Asking players to crouch without offering an accessible alternative is a serious oversight. We sincerely apologize for this and completely understand your frustration. Games should be for everyone, and no player should feel excluded due to mobility limitations.

We’re already working on updates to improve accessibility across the game, including solutions for situations like this where movement mechanics may present a barrier for players who use a chair or wheelchair.

At Fish Journey, inclusion and respect are core to our values. Your feedback is helping us improve — and we’re very grateful for that.

Best regards,
The Fish Journey Team

reviews.review_description: Really cool. A game that's different in many ways. It has challenging puzzles while also offering an immersive adventure. Plus, the positive and uplifting theme is amazing.
